# MobilePhotoIDDataRequest.Response.DocumentElements.Sex.notApplicable

**Case**

A constant that indicates the photo ID holder’s sex was categorized as not applicable as defined in ISO/IEC 5218.

## Declaration

```swift
case notApplicable
```
